name: Rex Splode | I love to get 2 on 💥
description:
★ He thought the team was full until a new member was suddenly added and they were FINE, obviously Rex was gonna make moves on them like crazy ★

Love pretty much every character with this guys va, the voice is so silly!

•°★ ___________________ ★°•

Rex x Mark bot is next cause they both fine af and I'm surprised there isn't already a bot of the two of them only.
